items.title: 张凌赫嘉人封面热议
items.summary: Chinese actor and Gucci ambassador Zhang Linghe's Marie Claire China July cover (styled in Gucci FW26 Demna-era looks, black-and-white leather and white feather versions) drew active fan discussion online. Reactions were mixed: praise for his fashion range and departure from his usual period-drama image, alongside some skepticism about his recent drama's production quality and comparisons to peer actors' star power. Ambassador-driven activation buzz, magnitude-damped per sentiment rubric rather than organic brand sentiment.

items.title: 【一粒万倍日】「グッチ」×安藤七宝店から最強開運日に向けたカプセルコレクション ワークショップも開催
items.summary: Gucci partnered with historic cloisonne (shippo-yaki) workshop Ando Shippoten on a capsule collection (Bamboo 1947 bag, small leather goods, scarves, key rings with rose/lily cloisonne motifs) timed to release on July 19, 2026 - a rare calendar convergence of three 'lucky day' omens in Japan. Companion charm-making workshops with Ando artisans run at Gucci Ginza (June 26-28) and Gucci Nagoya (July 17-20), placing the Nagoya workshop's final day on today's date. Brand/PR activation coverage, not organic consumer sentiment.
